entity.label: Bene-jaakan
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Children of Jaakan (Num. 33:31, 32), the same as Beeroth.

nodes.label: Bene-jaakan
nodes.description: Children of Jaakan (Num. 33:31, 32), the same as Beeroth.

verses.text: And they departed from Moseroth, and pitched in Benejaakan.
And they removed from Benejaakan, and encamped at Horhagidgad.
